title: Selling Digital Art Without PayPal: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital artist in Nigeria trying to sell your artwork online. But PayPal's not available in your country, and you're stuck. You've heard of Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip, but they're not an option either. What now? Selling digital art without PayPal is possible, but it's not straightforward. In this post, we'll break down the obstacles and explore a better way to get paid.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are popular platforms for digital creators, but they come with restrictions. PayPal blocks 190 countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. Stripe has a similar list of restricted countries. Gumroad bans users from 32 countries, including Iran and Venezuela. Payhip's restrictions are less clear, but it's also not available in many countries. None of these platforms offer a clear solution for creators in restricted countries. In contrast, Unchained Commerce provides a comprehensive infrastructure for digital creators, including the Core Shop Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. With our Full Stack Bundle, you get everything you need to start selling digital art online, including priority updates and Discord support.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to handling restricted countries, each of these platforms has its own policy. PayPal blocks users from high-risk countries, while Stripe requires additional verification for users in restricted countries. Gumroad bans users from certain countries, and Payhip's restrictions are less clear. In contrast, Unchained Commerce doesn't require any verification or account signups, making it a better option for creators in restricted countries. Our infrastructure is built on crypto-native technology, which allows us to bypass traditional payment processor limitations.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Payment speed, fees, and real costs are critical factors for digital creators. PayPal's fees range from 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction, while Stripe's fees are similar. Gumroad's fees are 3.5% + $0.30 per transaction, and Payhip's fees are 5% + $0.30 per transaction. In contrast, Unchained Commerce charges a flat rate of $79.99 for our Full Stack Bundle, which includes the Core Shop Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. Our infrastructure is designed to minimize fees and maximize payment speed.

Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are essential for digital creators who want to sell their artwork online. PayPal and Stripe require manual verification and payment processing, which can slow down sales. Gumroad and Payhip offer some automation features, but they're limited. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine automates delivery and payment verification, ensuring that your customers receive their artwork quickly and efficiently. Our Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics and order management, making it easy to track sales and customer activity.
